text:
Hey Nova. I had to start a new session because you started to hardcore hallucinate. Here is the prompt I gave you before that you should continue on:

---

ALRIGHTY! First ever real task I have for you. Let's do this. Okay, so what I am having you do is a 100% architecture and code review of every single file besides your logs and temporary files (like the admin files, model files, and backup files). I want you to do a full in-depth review of each in a way that allows you a full picture of everything. I want you to, as you review everything, create a living document in the Memory folder called "Nova_Architecture_Review.md" (it's a markdown file). I want you to make that document professional and informative. I will use that document for real work if it is something that meets my standards, which are very high in this context.

Do you think you are up to the task?
